overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic advertisements, cherry blossom trees, and narrow alleys with food vendors. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections and atmospheric lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide rain-soaked plaza at night, dominated by a massive holographic billboard displaying a woman with pink hair. An elevated highway overpass looms on the left while neon-lit buildings fill the background. The camera moves forward through puddles that reflect the vibrant neon lights, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open plaza into a semi-covered walkway, passing outdoor cafe seating. The environment becomes more sheltered as the camera ascends a stair ramp, with neon-lit cherry blossom trees becoming visible in the upper plaza area ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open plaza featuring modern concrete benches and illuminated cherry blossom trees with pink lights. Food stalls line the right side as the camera approaches a narrow alley entrance ahead, following a pedestrian into the neon-lit passage.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed alley covered by a dense canopy of illuminated cherry blossoms. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while neon signs including a green medical cross and various storefronts line the walls. The camera passes a food vendor at a noodle stall and navigates winding turns, encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered corridor lined with large fashion advertisement posters and hanging paper lanterns, transitioning into a grittier industrial back area. The environment shifts from neon-lit commercial storefronts to a yellow graffiti-covered wall and metal fencing, where several people are standing and conversing in the dimly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-soaked neon plaza into the intimate, grittier depths of a cyberpunk city's back alleys. It begins in an open square dominated by a massive holographic billboard and an elevated highway, moving through reflective puddles toward a semi-covered walkway. As the camera ascends a stair ramp, the environment shifts into a sheltered plaza filled with illuminated cherry blossom trees and food stalls before following a pedestrian into a narrow, enclosed passage. The scene then tightens further under a canopy of pink blossoms and red lanterns, winding past noodle vendors and neon storefronts. Finally, the camera passes through a corridor of fashion posters and transitions into a dimly lit industrial area characterized by yellow graffiti-covered walls and metal fencing.
